name: Wild Rice with Mushrooms (Satterly/maclellan)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the wild rice well in several changes of cold water.
2. Drain and make sure all dirt and stones are removed.
3. Combine the rice with water. Add the soy sauce and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and cover.
5. Simmer for 70 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, heat the ghee in a skillet until hot.
7. Add mushrooms and onion, and saute for 2 minutes.
8. Add green peppers and continue to saute for another 3 minutes, until the onion is softened.
9. Toss in basil and parsley. Stir and remove from heat.
10. When the rice has softened and the water has almost evaporated, stir in the saute mixture.
11. Let simmer for another 5 minutes before serving.
Adapted by Mark Satterly from a recipe posted by Anne Maclellan in Intercook.
